description: Product description Pack of 12.Toothbrush, Colgate Double action medium, 18 cm. Safety Warning Attention: this toothbrush comes in random color and random pattern. Please note that the colour and pattern may vary and the toothbrush may not be easy to recognise for children. Please use the toothbrush only for the mouth and keep it safe to minimise the risk of injury or choking hazard.
